title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast discusses how AI is transforming software engineering roles, examines tokenmaxxing as companies exceed annual AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling 120-billion-parameter models on personal computers, and explores challenges universities face integrating AI literacy into curricula.
